text:
A girl named Lily lived in a tree village. She was known for singing at the top of her lungs all day long. One day, she met a wise old owl who told her about a magical crystal that could grant three wishes.

Lily wished for unlimited friends. Suddenly, her tree and its inhabitants came to life! Many birds joined her, and all kinds of forest creatures became her allies. She realized everyone was her friend, and life was happier than ever.

The second wish bounced around in her mind. She wished to learn how to play the flute. To her delight, she discovered an old flute buried deep in the forest and started humming a tune. People began to gather around her, enchanted by the sound. She taught them how to play, and together they created a beautiful forest orchestra.

The last wish was subtle. She wished for peace among different species. Birds, rats, monkeys—they all learned to live harmoniously together. They built a nest together, made peace songs, and
